interventions.name: X3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: project-framing templates requiring requirements, constraints, users, and success criteria to be named explicitly

interventions.name: X3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: design-review routines that force architecture, quality, security, and ethical considerations into one bounded project account

interventions.name: X3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: cross-domain application prompts asking what remains distinctly computer-science about an applied project

interventions.name: X3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired capstone analyses transferring the same synthesis structure to a second advanced project scenario
